metadata.name: rayvision-maya
metadata.summary: A Python-based API for Using Renderbus cloud rendering service.

methods.name: rayvision_maya.analyze_maya.AnalyzeMaya.__init__
documentation:
Initialize and examine the analysis information.

Args:
    cg_file (str): Scene file path.
    software_version (str): Software version.
    project_name (str): The project name.
    plugin_config (dict): Plugin information.
    render_software (str): Software name, Maya by default.
    render_layer_type (str): 0 is render layer, 1 is render setup.
    input_project_path (str): The working path of the scenario.
    local_os (str): System name, linux or windows.
    workspace (str): Analysis out of the result file storage path.
    custom_exe_path (str): Customize the exe path for the analysis.
    platform (str): Platform num.
    logger (object, optional): Custom log object.
    log_folder (str, optional): Custom log save location.
    log_name (str, optional): Custom log file name.
    log_level (string):  Set log level, example: "DEBUG","INFO","WARNING","ERROR".

methods.name: rayvision_maya.analyze_maya.AnalyzeMaya.add_tip
documentation:
Add error message.

Args:
    code (str): error code.
    info (str or list): Error message description.

methods.name: rayvision_maya.analyze_maya.AnalyzeMaya.save_tips
documentation: Write the error message to tips.json.

methods.name: rayvision_maya.analyze_maya.AnalyzeMaya.check_local_os
documentation:
Check the system name.

Args:
    local_os (str): System name.

Returns:
    str

methods.name: rayvision_maya.analyze_maya.AnalyzeMaya.check_workspace
documentation:
Check the working environment.

Args:
    workspace (str):  Workspace path.

Returns:
    str: Workspace path.

methods.name: rayvision_maya.analyze_maya.AnalyzeMaya.check_version3
documentation:
Check the CG version of the scene file when it is Python3.

Args:
    cg_file (str): Scene file path.

Returns:
    str: Make the CG version of the scene file.
        e.g.:
            "2018".

methods.name: rayvision_maya.analyze_maya.AnalyzeMaya.check_version2
documentation:
Check the CG version of the scene file when it is Python2.

Args:
    cg_file (str): Scene file path.

Returns:
    str: Make the CG version of the scene file.
        e.g.:
            "2018".

methods.name: rayvision_maya.analyze_maya.AnalyzeMaya.location_from_reg
documentation:
Get the path in the registry of the local CG.

When the system environment is Windows or linux, get the path where the
local Maya startup file is located in the registry.

Args:
    version (str): Maya version.
        e.g.:
            "2018".

Returns:
    str: The path where Maya's startup files are located.
        e.g.:
            "D:/Maya/Maya2018/".

methods.name: rayvision_maya.analyze_maya.AnalyzeMaya.find_location
documentation:
Get the path where the local Maya startup file is located.

Raises:
    CGExeNotExistError: The path to the startup file does not exist.

methods.name: rayvision_maya.analyze_maya.AnalyzeMaya.analyse_cg_file
documentation:
Analyse cg file.

Analyze the scene file to get the path to the startup file of the CG
software.

methods.name: rayvision_maya.analyze_maya.AnalyzeMaya.check_result
documentation: Check that the analysis results file exists.

methods.name: rayvision_maya.analyze_maya.AnalyzeMaya.get_file_md5
documentation: Generate the md5 values for the scenario.

methods.name: rayvision_maya.analyze_maya.AnalyzeMaya.analyse
documentation:
Build a cmd command to perform an analysis scenario.

Args:
    no_upload (bool): Do you not generate an upload,json file.

Raises:
    AnalyseFailError: Analysis scenario failed.

modules.name: rayvision_maya.tests.conftest
documentation:
The plugin of the pytest.

The pytest plugin hooks do not need to be imported into any test code, it will
load automatically when running pytest.

References:
    https://docs.pytest.org/en/2.7.3/plugins.html

functions.name: rayvision_maya.tests.test_analyze_maya.test_check_path
documentation:
Test init this interface.

Test We can get an `FileNameContainsChineseError` if the information is
wrong.

functions.name: rayvision_maya.tests.test_analyze_maya.test_check_version2
documentation: Test we can get a expected result.

functions.name: rayvision_maya.tests.test_analyze_maya.test_check_version3
documentation: Test we can get a expected result.
